video_title: How to Fix Rejection in 5 minutes (INFIELD)

video_type.reasoning: Multiple distinct approaches to different targets (bad demos + one good approach) with commentary/breakdowns between each. Coach deliberately demonstrates bad and good delivery across several interactions.
